text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, that was delicious. Nothing beats bananas
when it comes to caloric efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Well, well! If it isn't the Banana Fiend!
Haha! Looks like she just had another one.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"Banana Fiend"? I hope they're not talking
about—

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Banana Fiend!
Getting that potassium fix of yours?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: E-excuse you! I'm not even sure I know you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Banana Fiend... How dare they call me that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So that's what happened in my dream...
choice_data_list:
You like bananas so much, you dream about
them?

You like bananas so much, you dream about
them?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
N-no! It may be true that I eat a large number of
bananas, but it's not only because of taste!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They provide energy to the brain, are portable,
and their sweetness helps reduce fatigue! It's only
logical that I would—

text_block_list.name: Vendor
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! We're having a sale on bananas today!
Come get your fill!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: They're having a banana sale?!
Stomach growls...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Is this really my fate? Can I truly not escape... the temptation?!
choice_data_list: C'mon, snap out of it, Banana Fiend.
C'mon, snap out of it, Banana Fiend.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Is this really my fate? Can I truly not escape... the temptation?!
choice_data_list: C'mon, snap out of it, Banana Fiend.
C'mon, snap out of it, Banana Fiend.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I thought I told you to quit calling me that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about that... And thank you. I nearly
succumbed to it...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's leave before my nightmare becomes
a reality.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why, it all makes sense now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My stomach's growling isn't an indication of my
gluttony but a signal from my brain to supplement
my body's nutritional deficiencies!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: In that case, I have no choice but to eat up!

She eats like a true champion. Seeing her devour
that many bananas almost makes me want to call
her "Banana Fiend" too.
